The '''Almaran system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Metharian Nebula Territories]] region<ref name="PotG3" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almar]].<ref name="PotG3" /> A [[Mission to Almaran|space battle]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took place in the system during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="BoP">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''</ref>

{{System-stub}}
